revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-285

Rods, tubes or sections of intricate shape formed by forcing metal or plastic through a die shaped to the required section.

The process may be undertaken hot or cold depending on the material.

{{IALAFooter}}
